caption:
The air in Santorini tastes like freedom—salt, sun, and secrets. I've got my heart set on this view, my sandals ready to chase the horizon. Let's see how the sea holds back when a woman in black lace leans into it 💃🌊

#TravelDiaries #SantoriniVibes #WanderlustAndAllure #InstaTraveller #GreekIslandsSecret
